title: Israel sends UAE laser weapon called ‘Iron Beam’ - What it means in face of Iranian drones and why is it important
summary_full: Israel has reportedly sent its advanced 'Iron Beam' laser defence system and surveillance tech to the UAE to counter Iranian threats, marking a significant defence cooperation step. This deployment, alongside US military sales to regional allies, underscores escalating tensions and a bolstered regional security posture amid the ongoing US-Iran conflict.
